title: Funimation 30 coming
wikitext:
[]: Funimation 3.0 coming             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:26 pm Heads up https://www.facebook.com/FUNimation?ref=stream&hc_location=stream Its in the banner No release date just yet. PS It looks like DBZ fans are pissed.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:37 pm Blog post: http://www.funimation.com/lee/blog/funimation-reaches-1-million-likes-on-facebook-and-acquires-evangelion-30/7722758

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:37 pm Good! Can't wait to own yet another physical copy of the movie. (Also, I really really REALLY hope they do a theatrical release of this movie.)

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:42 pm Ornette wrote: Blog post: http://www.funimation.com/lee/blog/funimation-reaches-1-million-likes-on-facebook-and-acquires-evangelion-30/7722758

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:43 pm hui43210 wrote: Wow, they just spoil the surprise plot right off the bat.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:47 pm Ænimal wrote: welcome to modern movie trailers/advertisements

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jun 11, 2013 4:47 pm That must merit at least a week's ban!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 11, 2013 5:03 pm Nice! Wonder if it'll be released on DVD/BD this year.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 11, 2013 5:23 pm pwhodges wrote: That must merit at least a week's ban!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jun 11, 2013 5:37 pm I own the Japanese BD, but I need the Funi release mainly so that I can have an English subbed hard copy. A legit one. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Jun 11, 2013 5:45 pm Ænimal wrote: welcome to modern movie trailers/advertisements

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Jun 11, 2013 5:53 pm Funimation wrote: Trapped in a harrowing cycle of death and rebirth, Shinji continues to courageously battle the angels

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Tue Jun 11, 2013 5:56 pm CJD wrote: Look Funi, I know 3.0 was really, really confusing, but it wasn't that confusing. You sure you got the license to 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jun 11, 2013 6:04 pm CJD wrote: Funimation wrote: Trapped in a harrowing cycle of death and rebirth, Shinji continues to courageously battle the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Jun 11, 2013 6:25 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Okay, it's harder to fuck up more than that.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jun 11, 2013 6:27 pm It's probably so not to give too much away about...well...yknow...all the wtf-ery Edit: Oh wait, it mentions the time-skip. Well I don't know then.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jun 11, 2013 7:24 pm I have a little giggle when I see people on other forums talk about how Funimation was dragging their feet in getting 3.0 & how they took way too long. It's funny cause everything post 3.0's theatrical release in Japan has been exceedingly speedy! It took 2.0 almost a full year - about 11 months - just to get a Blu-ray release in Japan. Right now, 3.0 is hitting shelves, crossing oceans, etc etc, in less than half to even of the third it took the previous two releases to do. Hell, I wasn't even a fan of Evangelion until long after EOE hit DVD in the States - a shoddy DVD but still - and that took years! With any luck this means Khara is not pussyfooting around & are knee deep in work on 4.0. A release in 2014 perhaps? With 2015 being "The Year of Evangelion"?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jun 11, 2013 7:28 pm Meantime I had a chuckle and the people asking Funi to acquire series of shows that didnt exist - that is to say season 3 of such-and-such an anime when season 3 hasn't been made yet or the show ended at season 2.

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Tue Jun 11, 2013 7:30 pm Jayfive wrote: It's probably so not to give too much away about...well...yknow...all the wtf-ery Edit: Oh wait, it mentions the time-skip. Well I don't know then.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Jun 11, 2013 7:36 pm Jayfive wrote: Meantime I had a chuckle and the people asking Funi to acquire series of shows that didnt exist - that is to say season 3 of such-and-such an anime when season 3 hasn't been made yet or the show ended at season 2.
